name: warzyw-templates
description:
Another batch of highly alternative random map templates.

Sim City:
Strong guards separate you from the other parts of your poor city.
Build your part well and you might be able to break through to the other players.
There's also a neutral part in the middle of the city with twice more towns and all Forts built.
Recommended difficulty: 160%.
Up to 8 players.
Size XL.
Inspired by the Pyda XL template.

Grond:
Are you strong enough to walk the path to the other human?
There's 1 path between Red and Blue and if you don't hurry, strong AI armies will get in your way.
Named after a certain fight in one WoG map (Gauntlet of the Grond in Swords of Night and Day by Jim Vogan), which was probably named after Morgoth's hammer from Tolkien's Silmarillion.
Size L,
2 humans,
6 AIs,
Average Road,
average timer and sim turns,
160%,
standard trades for town and color,
leave AIs' towns as random,
1x111 res,
tech res if passage to one of the AIs generates as a guarded portal on the road, you can't beat that guard without big losses and can't go around it
Suggested mods: HotA to get non-grass native terrain for Conflux and at least one mod with a new town.
author: Warzyw647

1.0: Moved Grond and Sim City from mod warzyw-templates. Brawl and Arena from warzyw-templates were moved to PvP-balance mod.

chinese.name: warzyw地图模板集
chinese.description:
一批可高度定制的随机地图模板。（由紫玥炎霄汉化）

8人随机特大地图模板（sim-city）:
这是一个受Pyda XL模板启发而来的随机特大地图模板，
名为模拟城市，支持8人游戏，推荐160%难度开局。
强大的守卫将你的初始小城与其他区域分隔开来。
只有好好建设你的城镇，才有可能突破到其他玩家的领地。
此外，城市中央有一处中立区域，拥有众多已经建设好堡垒的无主城镇。

8人随机大地图模板（Grond）:
随机地图模板，大小为L，包含2名人类玩家和6名AI玩家，有标准的道路。
人类玩家需要尽快通过唯一道路到达对方，以免被强大的AI军队阻挡。
建议160%难度开局，
每个玩家拥有1x111资源，
如果通往某个AI玩家的道路生成了一个被守护的传送门，那么你必须打败守卫或通过其他方式绕过它。
建议启用深渊号角模组，以获得非草原的原生地形，以及至少一个包含新城镇的模组。
模板名字意为“战锤”，来源于一个WOG地图（Gauntlet of the Grond in Swords of Night and Day，作者Jim Vogan），而该地图名称可能又来源于托尔金《精灵宝钻》中魔苟斯的战锤。
